title: One Piece
author: Eiichiro Oda
description: Monkey D. Luffy sails with his pirate crew in search of the legendary treasure known as One Piece.

title: Naruto
author: Masashi Kishimoto
description: Naruto Uzumaki dreams of becoming Hokage while overcoming loneliness, rivals, and powerful enemies.

title: Bleach
author: Tite Kubo
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and protects the living world from evil spirits.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Akira Toriyama
description: Goku trains, fights powerful opponents, and searches for the Dragon Balls across many adventures.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Hajime Isayama
description: Humanity fights for survival behind walls while uncovering the terrifying truth about the Titans.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: Tanjiro Kamado becomes a demon slayer to save his sister and avenge his family.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Gege Akutami
description: Yuji Itadori enters the world of curses after consuming a powerful cursed object.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Kohei Horikoshi
description: Izuku Midoriya trains to become a hero in a world where most people have superpowers.

title: Black Clover
author: Yuki Tabata
description: Asta, born without magic, aims to become the Wizard King through hard work and determination.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Yoshihiro Togashi
description: Gon Freecss becomes a Hunter and searches for his father while facing dangerous challenges.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Edward and Alphonse Elric search for the Philosopher's Stone after a failed alchemy experiment.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Tatsuki Fujimoto
description: Denji merges with his devil dog Pochita and becomes Chainsaw Man, a devil hunter.

title: Death Note
author: Tsugumi Ohba
description: Light Yagami finds a notebook that can kill anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Haikyu!!
author: Haruichi Furudate
description: Shoyo Hinata joins his high school volleyball team and strives to become a top player.

title: Blue Lock
author: Muneyuki Kaneshiro
description: Japan launches a ruthless training program to create the world's greatest soccer striker.

title: Tokyo Revengers
author: Ken Wakui
description: Takemichi travels back in time to save his former girlfriend and change the future.

title: Sailor Moon
author: Naoko Takeuchi
description: Usagi Tsukino becomes Sailor Moon and fights evil with her fellow Sailor Guardians.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Natsuki Takaya
description: Tohru Honda becomes involved with the Sohma family, who are cursed by the Chinese zodiac.

title: Ouran High School Host Club
author: Bisco Hatori
description: Haruhi Fujioka accidentally joins an elite school's host club after breaking an expensive vase.

title: Kamisama Kiss
author: Julietta Suzuki
description: Nanami becomes a land god and works with a fox familiar while navigating supernatural problems.

title: Ao Haru Ride
author: Io Sakisaka
description: Futaba reunites with her first love and tries to understand how they both changed.

title: Kimi ni Todoke
author: Karuho Shiina
description: Sawako, often misunderstood because of her appearance, slowly opens up through friendship and love.

title: Nana
author: Ai Yazawa
description: Two young women named Nana meet by chance and navigate love, music, and adulthood.

title: Paradise Kiss
author: Ai Yazawa
description: Yukari enters the world of fashion after meeting a group of design students.

title: Chihayafuru
author: Yuki Suetsugu
description: Chihaya pursues competitive karuta and builds deep bonds with her teammates and rivals.

title: Wotakoi: Love is Hard for Otaku
author: Fujita
description: Office workers who are otaku navigate romance, work, and hobbies together.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: Guts, a lone swordsman, struggles through a brutal world shaped by betrayal and destiny.

title: Vagabond
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: A fictionalized account of Miyamoto Musashi's journey toward becoming a legendary swordsman.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Makoto Yukimura
description: Thorfinn grows from a revenge-driven warrior into a man seeking a peaceful land.

title: Monster
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A doctor hunts a former patient who has become a dangerous and manipulative killer.

title: 20th Century Boys
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A group of childhood friends confronts a mysterious cult connected to their past.

title: Kingdom
author: Yasuhisa Hara
description: A war orphan aims to become a great general during China's Warring States period.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
author: Sui Ishida
description: Ken Kaneki becomes half-ghoul and struggles between human society and the ghoul world.

title: Goodnight Punpun
author: Inio Asano
description: Punpun's life is followed through childhood, adolescence, and adulthood in a deeply emotional story.

title: Spy x Family
author: Tatsuya Endo
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath form a fake family while hiding their true identities.

title: Kaiju No. 8
author: Naoya Matsumoto
description: Kafka Hibino gains the ability to transform into a kaiju and joins the Defense Force.

title: The Promised Neverland
author: Kaiu Shirai
description: Children at an orphanage discover a terrifying secret and plan their escape.

title: Made in Abyss
author: Akihito Tsukushi
description: Riko and Reg descend into a mysterious abyss full of wonders and deadly dangers.

title: Solo Leveling
author: Chugong
description: Sung Jinwoo rises from the weakest hunter to an overwhelmingly powerful player.

title: Tower of God
author: SIU
description: Twenty-Fifth Bam climbs a mysterious tower to find Rachel and discover its secrets.
